mechanism_narrative: A positive 1-month change in PAYEMS after a recession trough raises expected aggregate wage income and earnings revisions; stronger PAYEMS momentum predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest available PAYEMS was 137802 thousand as of 2020-06
failure_condition: Reject if positive PAYEMS 1-month momentum months do not deliver higher 20-day S&P 500 returns than negative-momentum months, or if walk-forward Rank IC is below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS crosses below 0.25%, the policy-rate floor compresses discount rates and signals liquidity backstops; this produces positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest available FEDFUNDS was 0.08% as of 2020-06
failure_condition: Reject if episodes following a FEDFUNDS crossing below 0.25% have positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in less than 55% of cases or average returns below the unconditional sample mean.

mechanism_narrative: UNRATE crossing above 10% identifies a severe labor-income shock that depresses consumption and earnings expectations; this predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest available UNRATE was 11.1% as of 2020-06
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE-above-10% trigger months produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of instances or if their mean return is not below baseline at p <= 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: RSAFS turning upward while UNRATE remains above 8% signals a reopening-driven consumption rebound despite labor slack; the joint pattern predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS 1-month growth turns positive while UNRATE remains above 8%
evidence_refs: fact:latest available RSAFS was 485545 million and UNRATE was 11.1%
failure_condition: Reject if the joint RSAFS-positive and UNRATE-above-8% condition fails to beat unconditional 5-day S&P 500 returns by at least 10 basis points on average in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous contraction in INDPRO and PAYEMS signals that production losses are reinforced by employment losses, lowering expected revenues and margins; this predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO and PAYEMS both fall more than 5% below their year-earlier levels
evidence_refs: fact:latest available INDPRO was 97.4587 and PAYEMS was 137802 thousand
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations do not have lower 60-day S&P 500 returns than non-triggered observations, or if the interaction term has the wrong sign in out-of-sample regressions.

mechanism_narrative: HOUST crossing below 1000 thousand units marks a sharp housing-investment contraction that weakens cyclical demand and household confidence; this predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest available HOUST was 974 thousand units as of 2020-05
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST-below-1000 trigger periods show median 60-day S&P 500 returns above zero or no statistically lower return than HOUST-above-1000 periods.

mechanism_narrative: Low CPIAUCSL inflation combined with FEDFUNDS below 0.25% keeps real policy rates contained and removes near-term tightening risk; the joint condition predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized inflation is below 1.5% while FEDFUNDS is below 0.25%
evidence_refs: fact:latest available CPIAUCSL was 257.214 and FEDFUNDS was 0.08%
failure_condition: Reject if the low-inflation zero-rate interaction has non-positive average 20-day S&P 500 returns or if its out-of-sample hit rate is below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: Weak RSAFS trend indicates impaired household demand and lower near-term revenue momentum for consumer-exposed firms; lower RSAFS momentum predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest available RSAFS was 485545 million as of 2020-05
failure_condition: Reject if negative RSAFS 3-month momentum months do not underperform positive-momentum months over 20 trading days, or if the sign of the estimated coefficient is positive in walk-forward validation.
